strings.enable_biometrics_screen_message:
Enabling biometrics provides an extra layer of security and is a convenient way to authorise log in. Only the Biometrics stored on this device will be enabled. 

It’s your responsibility to ensure that only your biometric data is stored and recognised on this device.
strings.enable_camera_permissions_message_01: You won’t be able to scan QR codes without enabling access to your camera.
strings.enable_camera_permissions_screen_camera_: Please go to settings to give the app permission to use camera. You cannot use this feature if you don’t give permission.

strings.enlarged_qr_code_sharing_disclaimer_cont:
• Victorian driver licence photo
	• Full name, birth date and address
	• Licence number, type and expiry date
	• Licence status
	• Proficiency
strings.enlarged_qr_code_sharing_disclaimer_mess: By presenting this QR code you

to share some or all of your driver licence information, including with scanners, venues and law enforcement agencies. They may retain your information in accordance with their business practices and legal requirements.

strings.mfa_enable_screen_message:
Receive a unique 6-digit code to your mobile phone via SMS or from your authenticator app. 

This activates two-step verification on your myVicRoads account.

strings.onboarding_page_1_desc:
Connect your myVicRoads account,
 and you're all set to access your digital
 licence and other key services.
strings.onboarding_page_2:
Your information is
 safe and secure
strings.onboarding_page_2_desc:
Your information is protected with two-step
 verification, app PIN, and biometric login.
strings.onboarding_page_3:
Easy access to your
 digital driver licence
strings.onboarding_page_3_desc:
Your digital licence is another way for you
 to prove your age, identity and right to drive.
strings.onboarding_page_4:
Verify digital licences
 using the in-app scanner
strings.onboarding_page_4_desc:
Use the in-app scanner to quickly and
 securely verify digital licences by
 scanning the QR code.

strings.privacy_statement_screen_message:
<![CDATA[VicRoads (R&L Services Victoria Pty Ltd, Us/Our/We) is committed to protecting the privacy of your personal information. We handle your information in accordance with the Privacy and Data Protection Act 2014 (Vic), the Health Records Act 2001 (Vic) and Part 7B of the Road Safety Act 1986 (Vic).

]]>
strings.privacy_statement_screen_message_01: To obtain your Digital Driver Licence (DDL) you must have a current myVicRoads account and have downloaded the myVicRoads app. We will use your information from your myVicRoads account to provide you with secure access to your DDL via the myVicRoads app. If you do not agree to let Us use your personal information for this purpose, we cannot supply you the DDL. This means you will continue to use your hard copy driver licence.
strings.privacy_statement_screen_message_02: Login to the myVicRoads app, enter your myVicRoads account username and password and a six-digit PIN will be sent to you to authenticate as the user.
strings.privacy_statement_screen_message_03: Once logged into your myVicRoads app you can access your DDL. You control who can view your DDL and what information you disclose through the use of a QR code. Refer to the VicRoads Privacy Policy for information about the data you’re sharing when the QR code is scanned. VicRoads does not monitor your use of the DDL, and no personal information is kept in the DDL.
strings.privacy_statement_screen_message_04: If you want to know more about VicRoads DDL, or the VicRoads Privacy Policy, that is, how We manage and protect your personal information please visit the links below.
strings.privacy_statement_screen_message_email_0: If you have any questions or concerns, including about the accuracy of your DDL, contact the VicRoads privacy team, email:
strings.privacy_statement_screen_privacy_policy_: the VicRoads DDL Privacy Collection Notice.
strings.privacy_statement_screen_subtitle_01: How can I get a DDL?
strings.privacy_statement_screen_subtitle_02: How do I access my DDL?
strings.privacy_statement_screen_subtitle_03: How can I control access to my DDL information?
strings.privacy_statement_screen_terms_and_condi: the VicRoads DDL Terms and Conditions and wish to receive a DDL.
